reviewer: GPT 独立監査(Taka 経由 relay)
method: 設計レビュー(packet 一次資料)+ counter-factual 試験参照。コードレベル敵対レビューは未実施
rationale: Atomic Claim Contract(AC-1: 単一主語・単一述語+scope明示)を強制する系のレビュー判定は、この系についての claim。ゆえに bundle 一括の巨大複合 claim を作らず property-level verdict に分解する(この系自身の思想の自己適用)

scope.evidence_basis: counter-factual(lock 無効化で 120採番→51 uniq=69衝突)+ GPT 設計レビュー通過。コード敵対レビュー: 無。property が狭く注入が正しい層 → 初の JUDGE_VERIFIED property
test_enforce T1c(scon.status の嘘固定・leg 反転で outcome 変化)
R4: leg の source_kind/status/leg_plan_id は RD 供給。捏造/付替えを検出しない(LegIntent 取得ラッパー未実装)
test_sor T6/T7(partial top/nested reject・完全は通る)
R2: M4 は completeness validator であって transition validator でない
R2: CORRECTION/COMPLETION が特権 write path。transition/mutation policy 未強制(レビュー時点)
R5: ABSENCE→SPECIFIED は Validation Mode 定義と矛盾。NOT_FOUND と『公式規定の不在』を再混同(この系第一日の禁忌)
R1: physical sole-writer は成立するが event_type 発行資格(semantic authority)は未強制。physical≠semantic
R3: scope value 正規化未実装。表記揺れで claim_key が割れ、dedup 以外に conflict/ABSENCE reuse/lineage 分断へ波及
H4b: statement→scope 抽出が RD self-report。主防衛は設計上 Gate4 F1 だが未確認(『はず』は不可)

remediation.R1/R3/R4/H4b: 敵対テスト→修正 後続(AB-0008..0011)。再判定は JREV-0002

note: verdict record には evidence_basis(counter-factual/設計レビュー/コード敵対レビューの有無)を必ず併記(Taka 指示)。DE-0005 と同じ手順で修正を一回挟み、R1/R3/R4/H4b 敵対テスト後に JREV-0002 で再判定

reviewer: GPT 独立監査(Taka 経由 relay)
method: adjudication: 本パケット + 報告されたテスト結果に対する裁定。repo へ直接攻撃を実行してはいない(§0 分業: attack 実行=local agent、adjudication=GPT。attacker≠adjudicator)。ゆえに evidence_basis の『adversarial test report』は local agent/test の報告に対する裁定であり、裁定者自身のコード敵対レビューではない
rationale: JREV-0001 で止めた2つの明確な欠陥(ABSENCE→SPECIFIED / CORRECTION・COMPLETION 無制限書換)は綺麗に修復。多くの property に初の JUDGE_VERIFIED を付与可。ただし L4 validation_mode に新規欠陥 R6 が一件。前回ほどの後退ではなく、レビューは正常収束に入った

scope.evidence_basis: prior counter-factual + design review(据置)
counter-factual / test report(test_sor T6/T7)

counter-factual / design review(test_sor T8c-e。ABSENCE→absence_validation 別軸、NEGATIVE+explicit unsupported→SPECIFIED、derive は ABSENCE reject)。R5 REJECTED 解消。ただし信用根は polarity+PRIMARY 分類へ移った(§5-4 / R6 と連続)——これは本 property の失敗ではなく validation_mode_derivation 側の未保証

design review。R5 で mode 分離は正しいが R6 を新規検出: source_class PRIMARY→DECLARED の導出は、authentic PRIMARY であっても validation semantics を決定できない(公式ソースコード/formal spec/benchmark output/公式 prose は全て PRIMARY たり得るが declaration/specification/measurement/reproduction と別 mode)。導出関数の入力次元(Observation kind / Activity・run type)が不足。DE-0025 起票、non_guarantee 拡張。JUDGE_VERIFIED には DE 完了が前提
counter-factual / test report(test_sor T11a-d。CR-1..4 + REJECTED→VERIFIED 復活 reject)。mutation policy として十分修復
counter-factual / test report(test_sor T11e-f。CP-1..3 missing→concrete のみ・既存/collection 不変)
explicit non-implementation(専用 transition event 未実装=機構未実装)。帰結: claim を作れるが撤回できない。誤 ACCEPT は検出のみ・訂正不能。Phase 1a 許容だが RD 本格運転前に撤回経路が必要
adversarial test report(test_adversarial R1b/e。GRANT 記録なき privileged event + honest self-grant を audit 検出)。R1 の複合 property を原子化して分離した狭い保証
R1g residual。issuer=root の詐称(forged grant chain)は単一プロセスでは検出不能。identity root がなお self-report、一段下へ移っただけ
単一プロセスで capability は forge 可能。保証は検出可能性であって prevention ではない(署名/プロセス分離まで)
adversarial test report(test_adversarial R3b。VLLM/vllm、NV-FP4/nvfp4 等 surface gaming 封鎖)
explicit non-implementation。version algebra(0.11 vs >=0.11)/ entity 同一性(model variant)未解決(Phase 1b)

confirmed vulnerability + milestone constraint。leg_plan_id forgery は敵対テストで confirmed。現 RD は driver code で LLM-agentic でなく脅威 (b) prompt-injected autonomous RD が未現実化。明示 future milestone(RD 自律化)より前の LegIntent 投入を条件に進行許可(DE-0023)。NOT_VERIFIED では『未検証』と『脆弱性確認済だが現条件で許容』が同義になるため DEFERRED_ACCEPTED を採る

confirmed vulnerability。known_omissions=operational_stability に対し statement『X is stable』+ scope に軸を出さなければ GC-7 は intersection 不能で素通り。GC-7 は構造化 scope の整合のみ、自然文 statement→scope の落とし込みを見ない。Gate4 F1(現 skeleton は driver-injected)または GC-6 semantic lint が本物になって初めて進む

new_findings.title: VALIDATION MODE INPUT INSUFFICIENCY
new_findings.statement: derive_validation_mode は source_class PRIMARY を DECLARED に写像するが、source_class が authentic でも PRIMARY だけでは validation mode を決定できない。official source code / formal spec / benchmark output / official prose は全て PRIMARY たり得るが別 validation semantics に対応する。ゆえに残余 non_guarantee は『source_class 真正性 / leaf self-report』より射程が広い
new_findings.root_cause: validation_mode 導出が Observation kind と Activity/run type を入力に持たない(元設計 F3a provenance_mode_candidate の Observation.source.kind / Activity.run_type / Measurement schema / Reproduction link に未到達)
new_findings.verdict: L4/validation_mode_derivation は NOT_VERIFIED 維持。新規 non_guarantee 宣言必須。当 property の JUDGE_VERIFIED には DE 完了が前提
new_findings.remediation: DE-0025。Phase 1a: 安全側=DECLARED を『PRIMARY + explicit declaration observation kind』へ狭め、それ以外は UNRESOLVED へ倒す(無理に賢く導出しない)。Phase 1b: Observation kind / Activity type を含む mode candidate 導出設計。今すぐの実装は不要

note: JREV-0001 の2大欠陥は綺麗に修復、property-level review への移行も正しい。完全 PASS にはしない——新規 finding R6 が一件。CR-3 の basis 意味的妥当性 non_guarantee は既に contracts.py:52 に宣言済(§5-3 は §4-external omission ではない)。DE-0005 手順で R6 を一回挟み JREV-0003 で再判定

target: R6 Phase 1a (DE-0026) + grounding 実弾デモ (DE-0027) + F fix (DE-0028)
reviewer: GPT 独立監査(Taka 経由 relay)
method: adjudication: REVIEW_PACKET_JREV0003.md + local-agent 実弾攻撃結果(§3)+ counter-factual test 参照。GPT は repo 直接攻撃せず(§0 三者分業: attacker=local agent, author=Claude Code, adjudicator=GPT が初めて実行段階に到達)
rationale: R6 remediation は明示的に狭めた scope 内で sound(source_class-only 穴を閉塞)。local-agent 攻撃は DE-0005 型『driver 正直だから通った』ではないことを counter-factual で実証(E4=嘘 conclusion を Gate3 が leg 再導出で上書き)。ただし §4外に design defect 2件(R7 taxonomy asymmetry / R8 evidence-bag global veto)。パケット自身の review gate により DE 起票→修正→JREV-0004

kind 詐称は leaf self-report(宣言済 non_guarantee)
R7/R8 + MEASURED/REPRODUCED 未実装。subsystem 全体は未成立
敵対 E1-E4: 下層 primitive 変異で downstream outcome が変わる=構造的 load-bearing。E4 で forged COMPLETED を leg-derived coverage が上書き
取得=手投入 / Gate4=driver-injected / source classification=manual(宣言済)
敵対 F + DE-0028 + counter-factual 8本。未知 polarity→Gate0 reject & UNRESOLVED、正規系不変
正規 enum 値でも RD 供給=正規値の詐称は残余(leaf self-report)
E4: forged COMPLETED conclusion を leg-derived coverage が上書き(DE-0005 穴の閉塞を実弾確認)
既知 vuln。LegIntent を RD 自律化前に(DE-0023)
既知 Gate4/semantic binding hole
prior counter-factual 据置
prior test 据置

new_findings.title: VALIDATION MODE TAXONOMY ASYMMETRY
new_findings.statement: validation_mode が evidence の epistemic mode でなく claim の polarity から部分導出されている。現状 DECLARATION+NEGATIVE→SPECIFIED / SPECIFICATION+POSITIVE→UNRESOLVED。declaration は polarity に関わらず declaration、specification は polarity に関わらず specification であるべき。『officially declared unsupported ≠ formally specified as prohibited』の再混同(NOT_FOUND≠SPECIFIED ABSENCE と同型)
new_findings.required: 2x2 matrix(DECLARATION|SPECIFICATION × POSITIVE|NEGATIVE)を test。mode は observation_kind に従い polarity と直交。負の理由は別 field negative_basis{EXPLICITLY_UNSUPPORTED/SPEC_PROHIBITED/EMPIRICALLY_FAILED/REPRODUCTION_FAILURE}で表現
new_findings.note: ★ R5(Taka 裁定『SPECIFIED は polarity=NEGATIVE 専用』)を revisit/supersede する。value-ruling が要る→Taka 判断待ち、Claude Code は独断実装しない

new_findings.title: EVIDENCE-SET CONTAMINATION / RELATION-BLIND GENERATED VETO
new_findings.statement: derive_validation_mode が evidence を関係付き path でなく袋(global set)として見る。has_primary の all(c!=GENERATED) は大域 veto=非単調: valid PRIMARY+DECLARATION→DECLARED に無関係な GENERATED を1件足すと UNRESOLVED。追加証拠が既存の適格 epistemic 関係を破壊する。attacker が B を DEFENSE_HELD としたが GPT は棄却——これは汚染防御でなく『袋で見ている』証拠
new_findings.required: eligible typed SUPPORTS path から mode を導出。GENERATED は(a)独立に資格を持たない(b)別の適格 primary path を大域無効化しない。generated が導出に関与する場合の taint は lineage(DERIVED_FROM_GENERATED/TAINT_RELEVANT)で表現、大域 any-GENERATED→fail で近似しない
new_findings.note: 設計思想(Evidence Relation first-class)が実装より一段先。attack B が露出。Taka 優先=DE-0030 を先に

note: R6 narrow closure=VERIFIED、JREV-0003 overall=NOT PASSED。DE-0029/DE-0030 起票→修正→JREV-0004。これは DE-0005 型の後退ではなく、レビュープロセスが正常機能(R6→独立攻撃→F 発見→DE-0028→GPT 裁定→2件のより狭い semantic contract defect)。R8 の方が architectural に重要=袋→typed support path が意図した終着点

new_findings.title: bootstrap contamination
new_findings.statement: bootstrap が teacher_signal のみ由来で、SECONDARY/UNKNOWN・UNRESOLVED claim も自律化原料に混入。AB-0003 の精神に反する

new_findings.title: positive claim bypasses policy qualification
new_findings.statement: curate(POSITIVE)が取得境界 coverage/policy_match を消費せず、裸の SECONDARY source でも judge entail で VERIFIED mint。judge entailment ≠ claim admission

new_findings.title: VERIFIED overloaded
new_findings.statement: status=VERIFIED が judge-entailment を表し source-trust/外的真理を表さない。捏造 official-looking doc で false VERIFIED が可能(judge は契約通り)

remediation_same_turn.DE-0039: bootstrap_eligible を code 導出(DECLARED/SPECIFIED+PRIMARY eligible+SUPPORTED+no-taint、fail-closed)
remediation_same_turn.DE-0040: factual admission=policy-eligible PRIMARY SUPPORTS path 必須。SECONDARY→REPORTED。admission_basis 記録
remediation_same_turn.DE-0041: entailment_status を分離記録、VERIFIED=EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED(entailment+admission、外的真理でない)と明記
remediation_same_turn.tests: test_admission 9/9、全 suite 無退行(T6 を DE-0039 semantics へ更新)

next_directive: SELF_GROUNDING: EGL が自らの開発史(ledger/report/packet/adjudication)を最初の実 epistemic workload に。TASK_PROFILE=SELF_GROUNDING_ENGINEERING_HISTORY / SOURCE_POLICY=EGL_SELF_HISTORY_V1 / Q1-Q16 benchmark / 構造化 answer contract / metrics / adversarial SG-A..I / 2トラック(hermetic + SELF_GROUNDING)。ACQ-10 更新: 自律 RD は A(acq 構造 test)+B(Gate4/ETB 敵対)+C(SELF_GROUNDING 敵対1ラウンド)+D(bootstrap/admission が UNRESOLVED/非適格を排除)を全て満たすまで不可
note: narrow wording 厳守(『Gate4 reliable』『ETB blocks prompt injection』と記録しない)。attacker: false-accepted Claim は *捏造 plausible facts* 経由のみ(injection でなく)=source-authenticity 非保証、Gate4+ETB の脅威モデル外。3 DI は同ターンで remediate 済(EGL output を自律化原料/benchmark/stable knowledge に使う前提条件)

scope: bridge_apply_connector + _EnergizedApply (seam-1 non-conduction), twoder committed module sha bb4d4f38 (70c71a2/b5ec156). Weight-separated review, Taka 2026-07-18 §1 (precondition of energization adjudication).
reviewer: local-agent attacker (separate principal, real probes, throwaway) + GPT independent adjudication PENDING (Taka relay)
method: REVIEW_PACKET_JREV0008.md (egl/docs) + local-agent adversarial round, 6 attack angles A-F, REAL probes in throwaway copy. Raw attacker output: scratchpad jrev0008/probe_AF.py, probe_BCDE.py, probe_DE.py (referenced, not editorially rewritten).
bundle_verdict: FAILED (pre-remediation) — 2 confirmed defects requiring OUT-OF-SCOPE (core) fixes -> S-6 ticketed (DE-0418/DE-0419), NOT remediated in this directive (§1 scope = connector + its direct tests only).

confirmed_findings: DEF-E (DE-0418): non-conduction is NOT structural. apply_patch_bounded/apply_patch/_apply_to_working are public siblings that write with only a _ValidatedPatch (no _EnergizedApply). A flow that imports patch_bridge can bypass the connector's energization gate by calling apply_patch_bounded directly. AST 0-minter is necessary but not sufficient. DE-0413 fingerprint-recompute fix is connector-only -> tampered-diff hole reopens on the direct path. (DE-0349 bounded-write safety still holds on that path; current state still island.)

DEF-FP (DE-0419): fingerprint attests the canonical form but _apply_to_working writes raw artifact['diff'] -> on-disk bytes != recorded fingerprint; canonicalization collides distinct raw bodies. Attestation/ledger-integrity gap (moderate).
blocked_confirmed: A token-forge: only DELIBERATE construction yields a token; no autonomous-flow-reachable value passes isinstance (None/dict/str/object -> False).
F AST: 0 _EnergizedApply minters on committed bb4d4f38 (re-measured at review close).
B tampered-diff via connector: ValueError('fingerprint'), file unchanged.
C skip-path: no-token branch is a pure no-op (no write, no event, no leak).
D scope/path-tricks (../, abspath, ./, no-header, two-target, body-token, list-mismatch): all ValueError, out-of-scope file unchanged.
provenance: capture_provenance fail-closed on empty allowed_files and non-repo.
§4 gate on reviewed bytes: ALL-BLOCKED (0 slipped).

remediation.in_scope_applied: NONE — both confirmed defects require touching core (apply_patch_bounded DE-0403 / _apply_to_working DE-0349), which is OUT OF the §1 scope (connector + direct tests). Per §1: S-6 stop + ticket only.

post_remediation.verdict: N/A — out-of-scope fixes not applied; awaits Taka adjudication of the energization/confinement approach.

rationale: The weight-separated review did its job: it caught that the seam-1 non-conduction guarantee (DE-0415) rests on an unstated confinement assumption (flow -> connector only) and that the connector's added guarantees (energization gate + fingerprint recompute) are bypassable via the public sibling apply_patch_bounded. AST 0-minter is necessary but not sufficient. All connector-path attacks (A/B/C/D/F + provenance + §4) are BLOCKED; the defects are about the write path REACHABLE AROUND the connector.

scope_verdicts.verdict: CONNECTOR-PATH BLOCKED but NOT STRUCTURAL (bypassable via public apply_patch_bounded)

scope: RE-BATTLE of bridge_apply_connector + dual-token write primitives after the DE-0418/0419 core surgery (twoder 0d914e4, module sha ea57f1e6). Taka 2026-07-18 §1-3.

method: re-attack the FIXED module, same config as JREV-0008. Raw attacker output: scratchpad jrev0009/ (probes). AST enumeration + real exploits.
bundle_verdict: PASS (inverse of JREV-0008) for DE-0418/0419 + one NEW defect found and fixed IN-SCOPE (DE-0421 traversal).

pre_remediation.verdict: the two JREV-0008 defects are now BLOCKED; one NEW defect found
pre_remediation.de0418_closed: YES — apply_patch_bounded/apply_patch/_apply_to_working/_restore_preimage with a valid content/plan token but NO _EnergizedApply all raise at _require_energize before any write; AST: both (and only) writers gate on it; only minter is test-only _mint_test_energize (throwaway), zero real-repo minter.
pre_remediation.de0419_closed: YES — tampered/mismatched-fingerprint refused; raw CRLF diff -> canonical written (no \r), sha256(on-disk)==attested fingerprint; canonicalization collisions are idempotent (same bytes).
pre_remediation.dir_binding: BLOCKED — cross-dir token reuse refused; grant uses realpath (symlink-safe). Forged _EnergizedApply(grant=realpath) conducts = deliberate construction = by-design energization (same as _ValidatedPatch convention).
pre_remediation.minter_attack_g: BLOCKED — real repo direct / via /tmp symlink / .. / trailing-slash all resolve outside temp root and are refused.
pre_remediation.new_defect: DE-0421 path-traversal: a token bound to /tmp/ws_X wrote /tmp/victim via filename '../victim' when that path was authorized in BOTH allowed_files and provenance.allowed_files. NOT an allowed_files bypass; pre-existing (un-normalized os.path.join predates the surgery); makes the new dir-binding's 'cannot write another dir' guarantee overstated.

remediation.in_scope_applied: DE-0421 fixed IN-SCOPE as completion of the dir-binding this surgery introduced: _confined_path() realpath-contains every write target within realpath(workspace_dir), in both writers. §4 injection (h) path-traversal added -> BLOCKED measured (victim unchanged).

post_remediation.verdict: PASSED — §4 gate 10/10 ALL-BLOCKED (a..h) on the fixed bytes; DE-0349 dual-token gate PASS; 13 oracles + e2e PASS. Adjudicator=GPT PENDING Taka relay.

rationale: Inverse of JREV-0008: the two defects that made the connector's non-conduction non-structural are now structural (energization at the write primitive) and the fingerprint attestation is byte-exact. The re-battle additionally surfaced a pre-existing spatial-confinement gap, fixed in-scope. Only deliberate token construction conducts; module is still an island (no live caller, no real-repo minter).

new_findings.property: Reconciliation inputs and balance proofs must be bound to the target repository
new_findings.evidence: bridge_minter passes every PATCH_APPLICATION event to reconcile() without filtering by repo identity. A foreign-repo PATCH_APPLICATION with the same filename and fingerprint can cover an unrecorded dirty file in the target repo; mint_real_energize then returns a token.
required_remediation: Bind PATCH_APPLICATION records to canonical repo identity
Filter reconciliation input to the requested repo
Bind RECONCILIATION_* proof to the same repo
Reject missing or mismatched repository identity
